business_definition: The value must be provided.
The value is mandatory only when specified business conditions are satisfied.
The value must be unique within its scope.
The value cannot be modified after creation.
Numeric value must be greater than zero.
Numeric value must be zero or greater.
Numeric value must lie between 0 and 100.
Numeric value must satisfy a defined lower bound.
Numeric value must satisfy a defined upper bound.
Numeric value must lie within a specified interval.
Value must follow ISO-8601 date format.
Value must follow ISO-8601 date-time format.
Value must conform to a valid email format.
Value must conform to a valid Indian mobile number format.
Value must conform to a valid Permanent Account Number format.
Value must conform to a valid Aadhaar number format.
Value must conform to ISO 3779 Vehicle Identification Number format.
Value must conform to the Indian vehicle registration number format.
Value must exist within the referenced master catalog.
Value must satisfy domain-specific business rules.
remarks: Used when validation cannot be expressed by a simple pattern.
